evals.prompt: Use .understand-anything/knowledge-graph.json to draft an event model for an existing SaaS billing codebase.
evals.expected_output: Inspects graph shape, extracts candidate stories/slices/events with confidence labels, asks domain questions, and does not write YAML unless requested.

evals.prompt: The codebase and .understand-anything/knowledge-graph.json changed since the last extraction. Update the existing event model incrementally and show what would be added, updated, stale, or conflicting before writing files.
evals.expected_output: Reads the existing model and extraction-state baseline, compares current evidence with prior provenance, proposes add/update/stale/conflict changes, preserves existing YAML decisions, and updates extraction-state only after confirmed writes.
